# hashes corpus. Synthetic invalid placeholders only.

# === bcrypt ===
# expect: bcrypt Hash
$2b$10$N9qo8uLOickgx2ZMRZoMyeIjZAgcfl7p92ldGxad68LJZdL17lhWy

# === md5crypt ===
# expect: md5crypt Hash
$1$abcdefgh$abcdefghijklmnopqrstuv

# === sha256crypt ===
# expect: sha256crypt Hash
$5$rounds=5000$saltsaltsalt1234$abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyzABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQ

# === sha512crypt ===
# expect: sha512crypt Hash
$6$rounds=5000$saltsaltsalt1234$abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyzABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ0123456789abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwx

# === yescrypt ===
# expect: yescrypt Hash
$y$j9T$saltsaltsalt$abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789

# === gost-yescrypt ===
# expect: gost-yescrypt Hash
$gy$j9T$saltsaltsalt$abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789

# === argon2 ===
# expect: argon2 Hash
$argon2id$v=19$m=65536,t=3,p=4$c2FsdHNhbHQ$abcdEFGHijklMNOPqrstUVWXyz0123456789

# === scrypt ===
# expect: scrypt Hash
$scrypt$ln=14,r=8,p=1$c2FsdHNhbHQ=$aGFzaGhhc2hoYXNo=

# === PBKDF2 ===
# expect: PBKDF2 Hash
$pbkdf2-sha256$29000$c2FsdHNhbHQ=$aGFzaGhhc2hoYXNo=

# === phpass ===
# expect: phpass Hash
$P$abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz01234

# === phpBB3 ===
# expect: phpBB3 Hash
$H$abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz01234

# === Drupal7 ===
# expect: Drupal7 Hash
$S$abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyzABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ

# === Apache apr1 ===
# expect: Apache apr1 Hash
$apr1$abcdefgh$abcdefghijklmnopqrstuv

# === Kerberos ===
# expect: Kerberos krb5 Hash
$krb5asrep$23$user@DOMAIN.LOCAL:abcdef0123456789abcdef0123456789

# === NTLM labeled ===
# expect: NTLM Hash (labeled)
NTLM: aad3b435b51404eeaad3b435b51404ee

# === pwdump ===
# expect: pwdump Hash Line
admin:500:aad3b435b51404eeaad3b435b51404ee:31d6cfe0d16ae931b73c59d7e0c089c0:::

# === htpasswd ===
# expect: htpasswd Hash Line
deployuser:$apr1$abcdefgh$abcdefghijklmnopqrstuv

# === shadow ===
# expect: shadow Hash Line
root:$6$saltsalt$abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyzABCDEF:18000:0:99999:7:::

# === Block 3d $tag$ / {SCHEME} hash family ===
# expect: LDAP/Dovecot {SCHEME} Hash
# expect: PostgreSQL SCRAM-SHA-256 Verifier
# expect: WPA Handshake Hash
# expect: Application $tag$ Hash
# expect: Cisco Type 8/9 Hash
# expect: GRUB2 PBKDF2 Hash
# expect: MySQL caching_sha2 Hash
# expect: Django PBKDF2 Password Hash
# expect: Werkzeug PBKDF2 Hash
# expect: NetNTLMv2 Hash
# expect: MySQL Native Password Hash
# expect: bcrypt Hash
{SSHA512}AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
{ARGON2ID}$argon2id$v=19$m=65536,t=3,p=4$YWJjZHNhbHQ$ZWZnaGhhc2g
SCRAM-SHA-256$4096:AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA$BBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBB:CCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCC
WPA*02*aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa*bbbbbbbbbbbb*cccccccccccc*0
$keepass$*1*60000*0*aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa*bbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbb
$8$mNVU82akcUaWE1xx$dpYzgABe9ZGc4mNcQRfWv2V6FZ3RNF2RDXIDDXORfa
grub.pbkdf2.sha512.10000.ABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABAB.CDCDCDCDCDCDCDCDCDCDCDCDCDCDCDCDCDCDCDCDCDCDCDCDCDCDCDCDCDCDCDCDCDCDCDCDCDCDCDCDCDCDCDCDCDCDCDCDCDCDCDCDCDCDCDCDCDCDCDCDCDCDCDCD
$A$005$xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyy
pbkdf2_sha256$390000$abcsalt12$ZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZ
pbkdf2:sha256:600000$abcsalt$dddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddd
admin::CORP:1122334455667788:aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa:bbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbb
*A4B6157319038724E3560894F7F932C8886EBFCF
$2c$12$AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
